series_metadata.series_title: News Clips / Bureau Clips / News Clip emails
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of news articles from current newspapers / news services and emails of articles found on media webpages. These articles containing information regarding the Ohio Facilities Construction Commission and/or the Ohio School Facilities Commission; school district projects funded by the School Facilities Commission, and other subjects of interest and value to the staff of the Facilities Construction Commission.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
